title: tax — settings
description: Tenant-facing tax configuration + per-user preferences. The tax_provider_configs table is NOT settings — those are per-provider credentials owned by the tax module itself. This file declares tenant-level defaults (default address preference, notification routing) + per-user preferences (annual report subscription).

groups.label: Tax computation
groups.description: Tenant-wide defaults for tax rate resolution + address preference + notification routing.

sections.label: Address preference
sections.description: Which customer address to use for jurisdiction resolution.

fields.name: prefer_shipping_over_billing
fields.label: Prefer shipping address over billing
fields.helpText: For tenants selling physical goods, use the shipping address for jurisdiction resolution. For digital-only tenants, use billing.

fields.name: fall_back_to_tenant_region
fields.label: Fall back to tenant region when address missing
fields.helpText: When the customer has no address on file, use the tenant's default_region for jurisdiction resolution. Disable to REFUSE calculations for address-less customers (fail-safe).

sections.label: Rate resolution defaults
sections.description: Behaviour when no rate matches (rare — indicates seed data gap).

fields.name: block_when_no_rate
fields.label: Block calculation when no rate matches
fields.helpText: Recommended. Default 0% tax when no rate matches is a compliance risk — the tenant should explicitly opt in by disabling this.

sections.label: Notifications routing
sections.description: Where tax pipeline alerts are delivered.

fields.name: circuit_breaker_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on circuit-breaker opens
fields.helpText: Every user listed receives TaxProviderCircuitBreakerOpenedNotification. Tenant owners are always notified regardless.

fields.name: drift_detection_notify_users
fields.label: Notify these users on calculation drift detection

fields.name: exemption_expiry_notify_admins
fields.label: Notify tenant admins on exemption expiry
fields.helpText: In addition to notifying the customer (always).

sections.label: Retention
sections.description: How long tax records are retained.

fields.name: extended_retention_enabled
fields.label: 10-year calculation retention
fields.helpText: Enterprise-only. Extends tax_calculations retention from 7 years to 10 years for stricter regulator regimes.

groups.label: My tax preferences
groups.description: Per-user preferences for tax reports + alerts.

fields.name: receive_annual_report
fields.label: Send me the annual tax report

fields.name: receive_circuit_breaker_alerts
fields.label: Notify me on tax provider circuit-breaker events
fields.helpText: This preference only takes effect if the tenant admin listed you in circuit_breaker_notify_users. Owners always receive.

fields.name: receive_drift_alerts
fields.label: Notify me on calculation drift detection
